creator: shuvaev@physik.uni-wuerzburg.de
text:
Confirmed on amd64:
~> uname -a
FreeBSD wep4035 9.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT #0 r198671: Fri Oct 30 16:12:10 CET 2009     root@wep4035:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

~> yacc test.y 
Bus error (core dumped)

~> cat test.y 
%type <int> rule
%%
rule:
;
%%

Alexey.
